summary: Airy soundstage and a monster second set make this Pasternak source the top‑sounding version of the show.
review: The reviewer praises the Pasternak tape as the best‑sounding source, highlighting its airy soundstage and overall listenability. They also note that the second set is a "monster" performance, implying a high‑energy, memorable show. No specific song or technical problems are mentioned.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review emphasizes both excellent recording quality and a stellar second set, leading to a near‑top rating despite limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Nice airy soundstage; clear and pleasant listening experience. No notable flaws reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set described as a "monster" performance, indicating strong energy and flow throughout.
